selection_policy: Anti-fitting pool for CervoMutants calibration. Repositories are split into tuning, validation, holdout, and special lanes. Holdout results must not be used to tune defaults before the candidate changes are frozen.

repos.name: cobra
repos.reason: Existing comparison target and widely used CLI library.

repos.name: pflag
repos.reason: Cobra-adjacent but smaller flag parsing library.

repos.name: go
repos.reason: Mentioned in Go empirical-study samples; very large, so only scoped runs are valid.

repos.name: kubernetes
repos.reason: Common Go empirical-study and benchmark reference; requires scoped runs.

repos.name: moby
repos.reason: Docker/container code shape; useful holdout away from CLI libraries.

repos.name: hugo
repos.reason: Referenced by Go benchmark material; parser/string-heavy code.

repos.name: gin
repos.reason: Popular web framework mentioned in Go repository studies.

repos.name: etcd
repos.reason: CNCF distributed-systems code with real tests and concurrency.

repos.name: prometheus
repos.reason: Metrics and parser-heavy production Go.

repos.name: helm
repos.reason: Large Go delivery/devtools codebase with a broad package graph.

repos.name: rclone
repos.reason: Cloud storage and IO-heavy behavior.

repos.name: go-ethereum
repos.reason: Large complex Go codebase; scoped correctness-heavy packages only.

repos.name: terraform
repos.reason: Config/state semantics; not CLI-parser-only.

repos.name: consul
repos.reason: HashiCorp API/client and distributed systems shape.

repos.name: vault
repos.reason: Security-sensitive Go; only scoped runs to avoid high setup cost.

repos.name: grpc-go
repos.reason: Networking/API library with mature tests.

repos.name: chi
repos.reason: Small-to-medium router, good fast calibration target.

repos.name: echo
repos.reason: Alternative web framework for web-domain diversity.

repos.name: beego
repos.reason: Large classic Go web framework.

repos.name: fiber
repos.reason: Fast HTTP framework with different dependencies.

repos.name: testify
repos.reason: Assertions/mocks; survivors are directly test-actionable.

repos.name: zap
repos.reason: Logging/encoding with performance-oriented tests.

repos.name: go-zero
repos.reason: Large microservices framework outside Cobra-like domain.

repos.name: logrus
repos.reason: Small mature logging library.

repos.name: validator
repos.reason: Rule/tag validation; high branch and string signal.

repos.name: uuid
repos.reason: Small correctness-focused utility.

repos.name: decimal
repos.reason: Numeric operators and precision behavior.

repos.name: gjson
repos.reason: Parser/string-heavy code with fast tests.

repos.name: sjson
repos.reason: Mutation of JSON update logic and strings.

repos.name: jsonparser
repos.reason: JSON parser with likely fast unit tests.

repos.name: encoding
repos.reason: Encoding/performance correctness outside CLI/web.

repos.name: go-toml
repos.reason: Config parser with many edge cases.

repos.name: burntsushi-toml
repos.reason: Independent TOML parser holdout.

repos.name: yaml
repos.reason: High-value parser with versioning quirks; may need scoped setup.

repos.name: urfave-cli
repos.reason: CLI library independent from Cobra.

repos.name: kingpin
repos.reason: CLI holdout with older code shape.

repos.name: zerolog
repos.reason: Alternative logging implementation.

repos.name: pgx
repos.reason: Database client/types; scope avoids live DB requirements.

repos.name: go-redis
repos.reason: Protocol/client code; internal packages likely avoid live Redis.

repos.name: nats
repos.reason: Messaging/networking holdout.
